# What Is Ancient Philosophy?

*[Hadot](../philosophers/hadot.md) · 1995*

Hadot argues that ancient philosophy was first of all a way of life, not a theoretical discourse. Each school, Stoic, Epicurean, Platonic, offered 'spiritual exercises', meditation, self-examination, attention to the present, meant to transform the one who practices them. Theory was but the tool of a conversion of existence.
